title: cestichis disticha
intro: Cestichis disticha is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cestichis disticha include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Cestichis disticha can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
